# Rosalind Problem: Convert a Peptide Vector into a Peptide

## Problem Description

Given a peptide vector, we need to convert it into the corresponding peptide string.

The peptide vector is a binary vector of length 3n where n is the length of the peptide, and each position represents whether a particular amino acid is present in the peptide.

## Solution

```csharp
using System;
using System.Collections.Generic;
using System.Linq;

public class Program
{
    public static void Main()
    {
        // Example usage
        string vector = "
